description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image and docker:dind service, with variables CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER, and DOCKER_HOST. Define three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", then "docker build --pull --build-arg BUILD_TESTS=ON --build-arg EXTRA_CMAKE_FLAGS=\"-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-O1 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2\" -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .", and finally "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE"; also add a check_formatting job using the ubuntu:bionic image that installs clang-format-6.0 and git-core, echoes its path, symlinks it, sets CLANG_FORMAT_SINCE_COMMIT and CLANG_FORMAT_DIRS, runs git-clang-format-6.0 with those settings, echoes any errors and fails if any are found. In the test stage add an e2e job using the docker:dind image that exports DOCKER_SOCKET and DOCKER_HOST, defines E2E_IMAGE, starts dockerd, pulls the image, then runs "docker run -v \"$DOCKER_SOCKET\":\"$DOCKER_SOCKET\" -v $(pwd):/buildbox-e2e/src/buildbox-worker \"$E2E_IMAGE\"", and a tests job that logs into the registry, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and runs "docker run -w /buildbox-worker/build $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE sh -c 'ctest -V'". In the release stage add a release-image job that runs only on the master branch, logs in, builds "$CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE" with "docker build -t $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE ." and pushes it, and a trigger_e2e_rebuild job also limited to master that uses ubuntu:bionic, installs curl, and triggers the external buildbox-e2e pipeline via a POST request with the CI job token.
